ksef_number.description: KSeF reference number assigned by the National e-Invoice System (e.g. 1234567890-20250115-AABBCCDD-01)

invoice_number.description: Sequential invoice identifier (FA(3) field P_2, e.g. FV/2025/01/001)

issue_date.description: Invoice issue date in YYYY-MM-DD format (FA(3) field P_1)

sales_date.description: Date of sale/service delivery in YYYY-MM-DD format (FA(3) field P_6)

due_date.description: Payment due date in YYYY-MM-DD format (FA(3) field TerminPlatnosci)

seller_nip.description: Seller's 10-digit Polish tax identification number (NIP, digits only)

seller_name.description: Full name of the selling company or person

buyer_nip.description: Buyer's 10-digit Polish tax identification number (NIP, digits only)

buyer_name.description: Full name of the buying company or person

iban.description: Seller's bank account number in IBAN format (FA(3) field NrRachunkuBankowego)

net_amount.description: Total net amount excluding VAT (FA(3) field P_13_1)

gross_amount.description: Total gross amount including VAT (FA(3) field P_15)

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. PLN, EUR, USD). Defaults to PLN if not specified on invoice.

description.description: Product or service description (FA(3) field P_7)

unit.description: Unit of measure, e.g. szt., kg, godz. (FA(3) field P_8A)

unit_price.description: Price per unit net of VAT (FA(3) field P_9A)

vat_rate.description: VAT rate as percentage, e.g. 23, 8, 5, 0 (FA(3) field P_12)
